description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mac-pwsafe that builds pwsafe.app for macOS. The workflow triggers on push requests to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on demand. It uses a macos-14 runner, checks out the repository, sets up environment variables, installs dependencies, builds libyubikey and ykpers from upstream, caches and builds wxWidgets, generates xcconfigs, builds and tests pwsafe, and uploads the resulting dmg as an artifact.
